name: Swift Title Loans
description_short: Swift Title Loans provides car title loans in Los Angeles with same-day funding up to $50,000, requiring no credit check and allowing borrowers to keep their vehicle during repayment.
description_long:
Swift Title Loans operates as a title loan lender serving the Los Angeles area, specifically with a physical location at 1902 Avenue of the Stars in Los Angeles, CA 90067. The company is positioned as an emergency lending option for consumers who need rapid access to cash regardless of credit history. Their business model is built around collateralized lending using vehicle titles as security, targeting individuals facing immediate financial needs.

The company offers title loans ranging from $100–$2,000 for smaller amounts and $2,000–$50,000 for larger borrowing needs. Their core value proposition centers on speed and accessibility: online application completion in 7 minutes, same-day funding for applications submitted before noon, and approval based on vehicle value rather than credit score or history. They advertise no physical store visits required, no in-person car inspections (photo uploads substitute), and claim their service is free with no obligation to proceed. Customer testimonials highlight fast approval times, friendly staff, and straightforward processes.

Swift Title Loans distinguishes itself through operational convenience features, including fully online application and documentation processes, elimination of vehicle inspection requirements, and explicit welcoming of applicants with bad credit or past bankruptcy. The company emphasizes data security with 256-bit SSL and TLS encryption. Their website displays generally positive customer reviews praising the ease of process and speed of funding. However, the company also includes standard disclaimers that not all applicants will be approved and actual loan amounts may be less than the maximum advertised.

As a title loan provider, Swift Title Loans serves a high-risk lending segment with inherent trade-offs. While they offer genuine speed and accessibility for emergency cash needs, title loans carry significant financial risks including high interest rates (not disclosed on this website), potential vehicle loss through repossession if payments are missed, and a customer base that often cycles through repeated borrowing. The company's disclaimer explicitly warns that their products are designed for short-term relief, not ongoing credit facilities, and recommends credit counseling for customers in borrowing cycles. Their competitive positioning relies on speed and credit-agnostic underwriting rather than favorable loan terms.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Same-day funding available for applications submitted before noon with 7-minute online application process
No credit check required; approvals based on vehicle value rather than credit score or history
Borrowers keep their car during the loan period; title is held as collateral only
No store visit required; completely online application with photo-based vehicle documentation
Explicitly welcomes applicants with past bankruptcy, bad credit, and poor credit history
Loan amounts available up to $50,000 for qualified applicants
Advertises no-obligation free quotes and comparison shopping before commitment
cons: No interest rates, APR, or fee structures disclosed on the website, preventing transparent comparison
Title loans carry high default risk and potential vehicle repossession if payments are missed
Company's own disclaimer warns products are only for short-term relief and explicitly cautions against borrowing cycles
Customer reviews are dated (oldest from 2-3 years ago) and limited in number for assessing current service quality
Physical address listed (207 E Canal St, Mulberry, FL) appears to be corporate/administrative, not the Los Angeles service location
best_for: Consumers with immediate emergency cash needs ($100–$50,000) who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans
Self-employed or gig workers without stable employment history or recent tax returns required by banks
Individuals with past bankruptcy or significantly damaged credit seeking one-time rapid funding
Vehicle owners who can afford loan repayment and wish to retain daily use of their car during the loan term
diagnosis: Swift Title Loans is best for consumers facing genuine financial emergencies who own vehicles and cannot access traditional personal loans due to poor credit or lack of income documentation. The critical caveat is that title loans, while fast and accessible, are high-cost short-term products with serious default consequences (vehicle loss); this lender should be viewed as a last-resort emergency option only, not a regular credit solution. Applicants must carefully review actual APR and fee terms (not published on this website) before committing.
services: Car title loans with same-day funding option
Keep-your-car financing (vehicle retained by borrower during loan term)
Phone, email, and online application channels
SSL/TLS encrypted online documentation and data security
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 1902 Ave of the Stars #101, Los Angeles, CA 90067
